message:
fix(state): prevent ID reuse collisions and add terminal-state resource reclamation

Session auth (session_auth.rs):
- Add test verifying duplicate session ID ("s1") is rejected without
  overwriting existing session state
- Validate event codes and trace IDs logged on rejection

Saga orchestrator (saga.rs):
- Add ERR_SAGA_ID_REUSED constant
- Reorder checks: verify saga ID uniqueness BEFORE capacity check to
  prevent ID collision from masquerading as capacity exhaustion
- Add test: create_saga_rejects_generated_id_reuse_without_overwriting

Proof scheduler (proof_scheduler.rs):
- Add ProofJobStatus::is_terminal() method for Completed/DeadlineExceeded
- Add reclaimable_job_id(): find oldest terminal job for slot reclamation
- Add prepare_job_slot(): check capacity and identify reclaim target
- Refactor job creation to use prepared slot pattern
- Add helper functions make_window() and make_job() for test clarity

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
